team_name: TirpuKaryaSetu AI: From Court Judgments to Verified Government Actions
summary: Build an AI system that converts court judgment PDFs into verified, structured action workflows. The system uses OCR, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and a human verification workflow. It supports bilingual Kannada and English, reduces manual effort for officers by over 80%, and ensures accountability with full audit trail.
key_steps: Process court judgment PDFs using OCR and text extraction
Identify orders, directions, deadlines, responsible authorities, and conditions from the original judgment text
Convert the judgment into structured outputs: compliance actions, appeal options, timelines, and department routing
Apply policy and rule logic such as appeal windows, compliance deadlines, and urgency/risk flags
Send output into a human verification workflow where officers can Approve, Edit, Reject, assign ownership, and add notes before final action
Maintain full traceability by linking each action item back to the exact source sentence in the judgment
optimization_claims: Reduces manual reading and note-making effort for officers handling court orders by over 80%
Speeds up accurate decision-making immediately after judgment receipt
Prevents missed deadlines and lowers legal/contempt risk for departments
Bridges the gap between court judgment and on-ground government execution with clear ownership and evidence
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
